codeReview.summary: The feature consistently moves privileged user-control actions onto shared scope checks in AdminUserService, preserves the existing 403 contract for tenant-admin denials, and restores the control-plane lifecycle compatibility aliases without regressing the validated control-plane and tenant-authority paths. The implementation also retains service-layer audit evidence for denied cross-tenant actions and is backed by targeted integration, unit, and truth-suite coverage for force-reset, status, suspend, unsuspend, delete, MFA-disable, and lifecycle compatibility behavior.

summary: PASS. Tenant-admin vs super-admin privileged user boundaries are enforced consistently, denial auditing is preserved, and the compatibility lifecycle alias handling is covered without introducing a blocking regression.
